name: Black Beans Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon salt or 1 chicken bouillon cube
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat some vegetable oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and fry until translucent.
2. Add the pasta and tomato sauce to the pot. Stir and cook for about 10 minutes, or until the pasta is tender.
3. Pour in the black bean broth. Season with salt or chicken bouillon cube to taste.
4. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Serve hot with chopped chiles serranos, cilantro, and additional onion if desired.
